title: Kaphtoriy #3732
definition:
Caphtorim = see Caphtor "a crown"

 1) Cretans as the inhabitants of Caphtor as distinct from the
    Philistines
nasbUsage:
Definition: Caphtorim = see Caphtor "a crown"

 1) Cretans as the inhabitants of Caphtor as distinct from the
    Philistines

    NASB:  desc. of Mizraim, also their land
